common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to download shipping_document. You have to call v2.logistics.create_shipping_document to create a new shipping document task first and call v2.logistics.get_shipping_document_resut to get the task status second. If the task is READY, you can download this shipping document.

error_list.name: logistics.error_network
error_list.description: System error. Please try again later.

error_list.name: error_permission
error_list.description: Sorry you don't have the permission, detail: {msg}.

error_list.name: error_server
error_list.description: System error. Please try again later.

error_list.name: logistics.unknown_error
error_list.description: Unknown error, please contact Shopee to check. Detail: {msg}

error_list.name: logistics.error_booking_order
error_list.description: This order is matched order with booking, don't need arrange shipment through seller side.

request_params.name: shipping_document_type
request_params.description: The type of shipping document. Available values: NORMAL_AIR_WAYBILL, THERMAL_AIR_WAYBILL, NORMAL_JOB_AIR_WAYBILL, THERMAL_JOB_AIR_WAYBILL, THERMAL_UNPACKAGED_LABEL

request_params.name: order_list

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: package_number
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should't fill the field with empty string when there is't a package number.

request_params.description: The list of orders you need to download it's shipping document.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://open.admin.shopee.io/api/v2/logistics/download_shipping_document?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "order_list": [
        {
            "order_sn": "201118BCKPJQQ8",
            "package_number": "2485710696837122445"
        }
    ],
    "shipping_document_type": "NORMAL_AIR_WAYBILL"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

response_sample.value:
If Success, this api will return a waybill file.
If Fail, this api will return the error message as the example below.
{
    "error":"logistics.xxxxx",
    "message":"The package can not print now, please .......",
    "request_id":"814468c0f07157681b78f6f0b58030db"
}

value.message: The package can not print now, please create shipping document first.Detail: these orders: 220725D58XURJS should print
